hero.title: Your organization's strategic plan
hero.subtitle: Nine conversation-guided modules, from mission to evaluation, with the methodological rigor of a consultancy, at a substantially lower cost.

how.heading: Nine modules, one continuous thread
how.card1Body: Mission, vision, principles and values — the base everything else is built on.
how.card2Body: SWOT/FLOA and MICMAC, with an interactive quadrant diagram to prioritize key variables.
how.card3Body: Strategies, objectives, action plan, KPIs with traffic-light indicators, and annual evaluation.

howItWorksPage.title: How it works
howItWorksPage.intro: A nine-module conversational process, with continuity of context from start to finish: what you define in one module automatically feeds the next.
howItWorksPage.m1Desc: Through guided conversation, we define your organization's fundamental purpose and the aspirational destination it's working toward.
howItWorksPage.m2Desc: We establish the ethical principles and values that guide your team's daily decisions, aligned with the mission already defined.
howItWorksPage.m3Desc: Analysis of strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats, with the extended FLOA methodology for greater depth.
howItWorksPage.m4Desc: Interactive influence/dependence diagram between strategic variables, with automatic quadrant classification to prioritize what truly matters.
howItWorksPage.m5Desc: Formulation of 3 to 7 strategies, calibrated to your organization's size and reality, built directly on the previous analysis.
howItWorksPage.m6Desc: Translation of each strategy into measurable objectives and concrete targets, with defined timelines.
howItWorksPage.m7Desc: Operational detail: activities, owners and resources, organized in a spreadsheet exportable to Excel or PDF.
howItWorksPage.m8Desc: Key performance indicators with a traffic-light panel, to monitor progress at a glance.
howItWorksPage.m9Desc: Annual progress review, with the ability to update the MICMAC and adjust course without losing prior work.
howItWorksPage.contextNote: Unlike a blank template, each module remembers what you defined before — the system keeps your organization's thread intact from start to finish.

whoForPage.title: Who it's for
whoForPage.intro: Built for organizations of any size that need a clear strategic plan, without the cost of traditional consulting.
whoForPage.seg1Desc: NGOs and organizations with teams of 1 to 5 people, without a dedicated strategic planning function.
whoForPage.seg2Desc: Established teams that need to align multiple programs or departments under one strategy.
whoForPage.seg3Desc: Large organizations or multi-chapter networks that need strategic coherence across different units.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.intro: Contact us to learn about plans available during our pilot phase.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.intro: We started this to make quality strategic planning accessible to any organization.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: Tell us about your organization and we'll get back to you soon.
